title: Talk to Her
tmdbOverview: Two men share an odd friendship while they care for two women who are both in deep comas.
synopsis: Talk to Her (2002) is a drama and romance film from Spain. It holds a solid 7.9 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
